nodes.label: auth.ts
nodes.purpose: Server actions: Google OAuth, magic link, sign out.

nodes.label: journey.ts
nodes.purpose: Choice submit, acknowledge, pivot, XP/streak updates via Supabase.

nodes.label: onboarding.ts
nodes.purpose: Creates profile + first journey after 2-step onboarding wizard.

nodes.label: create-next-node.ts
nodes.purpose: Loads journey context, generates or falls back, then persists through Supabase RPC.

nodes.label: fallback.ts
nodes.purpose: Deterministic AI node template when LLM unavailable or invalid.

nodes.label: generate-node.ts
nodes.purpose: OpenAI/Gemini structured next-node generation with Zod validation.

nodes.label: routes.ts
nodes.purpose: Single source of truth for route paths and public/auth route lists.

nodes.label: middleware.ts
nodes.purpose: Session refresh + redirect logic invoked from the root proxy.

nodes.label: server.ts
nodes.purpose: Server-side Supabase client (cookies). Used by pages, actions, API routes.

nodes.label: proxy.ts
nodes.purpose: Next.js proxy entry: delegates session refresh and private-route redirects.
